name: Down and Dirty Apple Chutney Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the applesauce and honey, blending well.
2. Add the raisins.
3. Blend in the lemon juice and vinegar, mixing well.
4. Add all of the remaining ingredients, blending well.
5. Cover and chill.
Makes about 1 3/4 cups of dip
Suggested Dippers: Pound Cake Cubes, Dried Fruit, Steak, Apricots, Melon, Italian Bread Chunks, Croutons
